meaning: n.网球运动adj.网球的,用于网球运动的vi.打网球
examples: I'm not much good at tennis.
He's not much of a tennis player.
I enjoy playing tennis and squash.
Not long ago table tennis was a game played by geeky kids in youth clubs.
Horses watch the few cars speeding past with the attentiveness of spectators at a tennis match.
